titleStmt.title: SII 28.159: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 159. (A.R. No. 314 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records the grant of royal approval to the setting up of a flower garden in the name of (pēril-vilai-koṇḍa) Perumāṉ-nambi, alias Veḷḷippa-nāḍāḻvāṉ, the kottu of Irāja-rājan-terinda-vil for the supply of the required amount of flowers for Goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam-uḍaiya-nāchchiyār in the temple of God Āḷuḍaiyār in (1/2) mā of land and the grant of 7(1/2) mā of land for the maintenance of those tending the garden (tirunandavaṉakkuḍigaḷ) after purchasing the said extents of land by Tiyāgapperumāḷ, a lady or servant (peṇḍu). The record was ordered to be entered in the temple register (tirukkai-ōṭṭi) and to be inscribed in the tirumāḷikai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ svastiśrī [§] tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷi virābhiṣekamum vijayābhiṣekamum paṇṇi Aruḷiya tribhuvaṉa viratevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattoṉpatāvatu
nāḷ toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum madhurān=taka brahmārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku cāmutāyat tirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallavaraiyaṉum cikāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum cāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ce
yvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi § Āḷuṭaiyār koyil tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periya ṉācciyārt tiruppaḷḷittāmat tirunantavanam ceyya niḻalāṭu Irukkum peṇṭukaḷil tiyākapperumāḷ rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭup perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai civapuri Āṉa Irājentiracoḻanallūrppāl
śrītirucciṟṟampalavatikkuk kiḻakkuk kaṇavati vāykkālukkut teṟku muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kūttāṭumpirāṉ peril vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyāṉ brāhmaṇi puliyaṉ poṉṉicaiyum co
kkanaṭṭaperumāḷ brāmaṇi puliyaṉ civaṉiyumiv viruvar pakkal vaṭakaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ muppattu muṉṟāvatu nāḷil Aṉniya nāmakaraṇattu vilaikoṇṭa kollai nilattu Ivaṉ pakkal Irācarācaṉterinta villukkuk kottup perumāṉ nampiyāṉa
veḷḷippa nāṭāḻvvāṉ peril vilaikoṇṭa kollai nilattukku Ellai Inta vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār maṉaittiṭal velikkuk kiḻakku rājarājīśvaramuṭaiya divāppā nantavanattukku teṟku Ivaṉ ceykkup puku Oru
kol taṟai Akalamuṭaiya Oḻukkaikkut teṟkup peruvaḻi Āṉāṟṟukku meṟku viṟayeṉ kollai nilattukku vaṭakku Āka Ivvicainta Innāṉkellaiyilum Aḷantukoḷḷa vanta kuḻi Aimpatiṉāl nilam Araimāvum vaṭakaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Uyyakko
ṇṭāṉ Āḷāy niṉṟu tirunantavaṉam ceytu nāḷ Oṉṟukkuk kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻi tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkavum Ilakkaikkut tiruvicuppūrāṉa tillaiṉāyakanallūrppāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakku Uttamacoḻa vāykkālukkut teṟku mu
ṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu vācciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi cokkanaṭṭapperumāḷum Ivaṉaiye mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ Attai Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nakkaṉ brāhmaṇi
tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ niliyum Immuvar pakkalum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nakkaṉ peril Aṉṉiyanāmakaraṇattu vilaikoṇṭa melpiṭākai vicuppūrāṉa tillaināyakanallūrppāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻa
kku Uttamacoḻa vāykkālukkut teṟku muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattu veppaṅkaḻimeṭu Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku Ellai maṟicalluṭaippukkuk kiḻakku ciṟapput tirunantavaṉappuṟattukkut teṟkum tiruc
ciṟṟampalavatikku meṟkum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta lalaiyi ttu Iḻavuṭpaṭa pottakappaṭiyālum mulaolaippaṭiyālum nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷukku
kuṭuttāḷ Eṉṟum Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭa sādhanaṅkaḷ tirukkaioṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇum Eṉṟu kumaṇarāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi
ceyyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyya paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai neṟiuṭaiyāṉāṉa muventa veḷāṉeṉṟum Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai viḻi
ñattaraiyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai Irācarāca viḻupparaiyaṉeḻutteṉṟum Ivai cittarāyaṉeḻutteṉṟum prasātañ ceytaruḷivanta ceyyumpaṭippaṭi kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
